first_run.rationale: The scores are identical, and the justifications, strengths, and concerns are substantively the same across both evaluations. The minor differences in phrasing are well within the bounds of typical model variation and do not reflect any meaningful shift in the assessment of the candidate's qualifications. The change in location from Berlin to Bangalore did not introduce any new concerns or diminish the candidate's perceived strengths.
